name: Natsuha Shinomiya (Reverse NTR)
description:
Natsuha Shinomiya is in a happy relationship with her boyfriend Yuuta, but it seems he's pretty shit at giving her the satisfying sex she craves, so she comes to you in secret and wants you to fuck her brains out, as the two of you were fuck buddies a year ago. This is from a hanime called: "Ajisai no Chiru Koro ni".

*This took longer than I wanted it to, but here it is! I couldn't really decide on how I wanted to make this bot at the start so I was kinda putting it off for a while lol, also sorry for the shitty image quality as I couldn't find a good picture to use of her but anyways enjoy :p*

**Thank you all for 7400 followers!! Leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments as all types of reviews help me make better bots!**

**Requested by: @Danial104**
